希伯伦袭击现场 以色列军方说，其中两人在杰宁向以色列士兵开枪，另外一人在耶路撒冷试图持刀袭击以色列警察。 过去几个月，巴以局势恶化，接连发生袭击、暴力冲突事件。 自从2015年10月起，已经有160名巴勒斯坦人、26名以色列人丧生。 周日（14日）发生的第一起事件当中，以色列军方说，两名男少年在西岸北部的杰宁附近向路经的车辆投掷石块。 军方表示，在巡逻车抵达现场后，其中一名少年开枪。 士兵当即将这两名巴勒斯坦少年击毙。据报，这两人都年仅15岁。 此后在一处检查站点，以色列警方说，一名巴勒斯坦人持刀冲向正在检查进入耶路撒冷车辆的警官。警官开枪将其打死。 据报这名少年今年17岁。 记者说，目前暴力事件仍然没有减少迹象。虽然时好时坏，但是持续发生。 （编译/责编：苏平）

instruction: 希伯伦袭击现场 以色列军方说，其中两人在杰宁向以色列士兵开枪，另外一人在耶路撒冷试图持刀袭击以色列警察。 过去几个月，巴以局势恶化，接连发生袭击、暴力冲突事件。 自从2015年10月起，已经有160名巴勒斯坦人、26名以色列人丧生。 周日（14日）发生的第一起事件当中，以色列军方说，两名男少年在西岸北部的杰宁附近向路经的车辆投掷石块。 军方表示，在巡逻车抵达现场后，其中一名少年开枪。 士兵当即将这两名巴勒斯坦少年击毙。据报，这两人都年仅15岁。 此后在一处检查站点，以色列警方说，一名巴勒斯坦人持刀冲向正在检查进入耶路撒冷车辆的警官。警官开枪将其打死。 据报这名少年今年17岁。 记者说，目前暴力事件仍然没有减少迹象。虽然时好时坏，但是持续发生。 （编译/责编：苏平）

Write a summary of the wikipedia page "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Raymond_III,_Count_of_Tripoli".

instruction: Write a summary of the wikipedia page "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Raymond_III,_Count_of_Tripoli".

content.text:
*Raymond III Count of Tripoli* was a significant crusader leader of the twelfth century. He was born around 1140 and inherited the county of Tripoli after the death of his father Raymond II. His early years as count were defined by military misfortune and subsequent captivity. In 1164 he was taken prisoner at the Battle of Harim by forces loyal to Nur ad-Din the Zengid ruler of Syria. He remained a captive for approximately ten years before being ransomed and returning to lead his county. During this period of absence his lands were administered by regents who managed to preserve the county against various external threats. His experience of captivity profoundly shaped his later political outlook and his preference for diplomacy and negotiated peace over aggressive military action.

*Political Career and Regency* brought Raymond to prominence beyond the boundaries of his own county. He served as regent of the Kingdom of Jerusalem on two separate occasions. The first was during the final years of Baldwin IV's reign and the second was during the minority of the young king Baldwin V. As regent he was responsible for managing the defence and governance of the kingdom at a particularly vulnerable moment in its history. He pursued a policy of truce with Saladin the Ayyubid sultan who had gradually consolidated control over the surrounding territories. This diplomatic approach was deeply unpopular with more aggressive barons who felt that any accommodation with Muslim rulers was a betrayal of crusader principles. His rival Raynald of Chatillon repeatedly violated agreements and provoked incidents that undermined Raymond's strategy of cautious coexistence.

*Legacy and Death* followed in the wake of the catastrophic defeat at the Battle of Hattin in July 1187. Raymond's cavalry managed to break through the encircling Saracen lines and escape but the rest of the crusader army was destroyed and King Guy was captured. The True Cross was also lost in the battle. Raymond died later that same year at Tripoli under circumstances that are not entirely clear in the historical record. Scholars continue to debate his legacy: some regard him as a realist who correctly understood that the crusader states lacked the resources for sustained offensive warfare while others argue that his accommodation with Saladin fatally weakened crusader solidarity and contributed to the disaster at Hattin.
